answer: The 2024 Druid spell list has 13 cantrips (level 0), read from the catalogue (data/spells.json): assistance (Guidance), bouffee-de-poison (Poison Spray), coup-de-tonnerre (Thunderclap), crosse-des-druides (Shillelagh), druidisme (Druidcraft), elementalisme (Elementalism), flammes (Produce Flame), fouet-epineux (Thorn Whip), message (Message), poussiere-d-etoile (Starry Wisp), reparation (Mending), resistance (Resistance), stabilisation (Stabilize).
